value: Add as DS113 or next available ID after allocation review; valid CosMx sibling/component of the same IBD spatial benchmark family as GSE312420, not independently countable until sibling-platform policy is settled.
Performance differences in spatial transcriptomics platforms identify Treg biology in human inflammatory bowel disease [CosMx]
60 GEO sample records, GSM9345400 through GSM9345459
Intestinal biopsies / tissue sections from IBD and controls; sample titles include ileum, rectum, colon, CD, UC, inflamed/noninflamed, and HC
GEO family SOFT, MINiML, and series matrix links exist; series supplementary package GSE312415_files.tar.gz is available as a 6.0 GB TAR
NONE in checked sample records; data are packaged at series level
No SRA relation in GEO SOFT; NCBI SRA query for PRJNA1373285 returned 0 records
GEO says Citation missing; linkage to the Nature Communications benchmark is strong but not yet encoded in GEO

CosMx component of the IBD spatial transcriptomics platform benchmark. Same benchmark family as GSE312420/Xenium; public GEO evidence supports a CosMx-specific 60-sample record, but subject/section overlap with the Xenium sibling is not fully resolved from public metadata. Do not count independently until sibling-platform counting policy is decided.
